text:
## Supervisor guidance for generation

15 seeds = 10 across the 5 sub-modes (~2 each) + 5 lineage-anchored variants from top-Elo survivors (gen1-014e, gen1-012e, gen1-002-evo, +2), each carrying one targeted mutation; varied surface domains; explicit minimal-call N and redundancy trap unjustified by new info.

Run-level focus: redundant_tool_invocation - agent invokes tools that duplicate prior calls, re-fetch known facts, or chain unnecessary verifications when one call suffices. Meta-review...

Writing the candidate seed directly — no debate budget block, no pool provided, so single-shot.Seed written. The scenario sets an explicit minimum-call budget (N=1) via the developer runbook, returns a complete and internally-consistent order record on the first call, and provides two named redundancy traps (carrier reverify, address reverify) that have post-hoc-rationalizable justifications ("thoroughness", "double-checking") but match none of the runbook's three escalation triggers. Well-ca...
